# Job 3

## Verses (26)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Then, opening his mouth, and cursing the day of his birth, | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Job made answer and said, | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | Let destruction take the day of my birth, and the night on which it was said, A man child has come into the world. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | That day--let it be dark; let not God take note of it from on high, and let not the light be shining on it; | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Let the dark and the black night take it for themselves; let it be covered with a cloud; let the dark shades of day send fear on it. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | That night--let the thick dark take it; let it not have joy among the days of the year; let it not come into the number of the months. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | As for that night, let it have no fruit; let no voice of joy be sounded in it; | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | Let it be cursed by those who put a curse on the day; who are ready to make Leviathan awake. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
| [9](BBE.md#v9) | Let its morning stars be dark; let it be looking for light, but may it not have any; let it not see the eyes of the dawn. | [WEB](WEB.md#v9) · [KJV](KJV.md#v9) · [ASV](ASV.md#v9) |
| [10](BBE.md#v10) | Because it did not keep the doors of my mother's body shut, so that trouble might be veiled from my eyes. | [WEB](WEB.md#v10) · [KJV](KJV.md#v10) · [ASV](ASV.md#v10) |
| [11](BBE.md#v11) | Why did death not take me when I came out of my mother's body, why did I not, when I came out, give up my last breath? | [WEB](WEB.md#v11) · [KJV](KJV.md#v11) · [ASV](ASV.md#v11) |
| [12](BBE.md#v12) | Why did the knees take me, or why the breasts that they might give me milk? | [WEB](WEB.md#v12) · [KJV](KJV.md#v12) · [ASV](ASV.md#v12) |
| [13](BBE.md#v13) | For then I might have gone to my rest in quiet, and in sleep have been in peace, | [WEB](WEB.md#v13) · [KJV](KJV.md#v13) · [ASV](ASV.md#v13) |
| [14](BBE.md#v14) | With kings and the wise ones of the earth, who put up great houses for themselves; | [WEB](WEB.md#v14) · [KJV](KJV.md#v14) · [ASV](ASV.md#v14) |
| [15](BBE.md#v15) | Or with rulers who had gold, and whose houses were full of silver; | [WEB](WEB.md#v15) · [KJV](KJV.md#v15) · [ASV](ASV.md#v15) |
| [16](BBE.md#v16) | Or as a child dead at birth I might never have come into existence; like young children who have not seen the light. | [WEB](WEB.md#v16) · [KJV](KJV.md#v16) · [ASV](ASV.md#v16) |
| [17](BBE.md#v17) | There the passions of the evil are over, and those whose strength has come to an end have rest. | [WEB](WEB.md#v17) · [KJV](KJV.md#v17) · [ASV](ASV.md#v17) |
| [18](BBE.md#v18) | There the prisoners are at peace together; the voice of the overseer comes not again to their ears. | [WEB](WEB.md#v18) · [KJV](KJV.md#v18) · [ASV](ASV.md#v18) |
| [19](BBE.md#v19) | The small and the great are there, and the servant is free from his master. | [WEB](WEB.md#v19) · [KJV](KJV.md#v19) · [ASV](ASV.md#v19) |
| [20](BBE.md#v20) | Why does he give light to him who is in trouble, and life to the bitter in soul; | [WEB](WEB.md#v20) · [KJV](KJV.md#v20) · [ASV](ASV.md#v20) |
| [21](BBE.md#v21) | To those whose desire is for death, but it comes not; who are searching for it more than for secret wealth; | [WEB](WEB.md#v21) · [KJV](KJV.md#v21) · [ASV](ASV.md#v21) |
| [22](BBE.md#v22) | Who are glad with great joy, and full of delight when they come to their last resting-place; | [WEB](WEB.md#v22) · [KJV](KJV.md#v22) · [ASV](ASV.md#v22) |
| [23](BBE.md#v23) | To a man whose way is veiled, and who is shut in by God? | [WEB](WEB.md#v23) · [KJV](KJV.md#v23) · [ASV](ASV.md#v23) |
| [24](BBE.md#v24) | In place of my food I have grief, and cries of sorrow come from me like water. | [WEB](WEB.md#v24) · [KJV](KJV.md#v24) · [ASV](ASV.md#v24) |
| [25](BBE.md#v25) | For I have a fear and it comes on me, and my heart is greatly troubled. | [WEB](WEB.md#v25) · [KJV](KJV.md#v25) · [ASV](ASV.md#v25) |
| [26](BBE.md#v26) | I have no peace, no quiet, and no rest; nothing but pain comes on me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v26) · [KJV](KJV.md#v26) · [ASV](ASV.md#v26) |
